subject: Need help launching a coding academy
message: We want to launch five recorded coding courses and need guidance on payments, certificates, and demo import.
adminNotes: High intent academy owner. Follow up with installation checklist.

subject: Course migration query
message: We already have recorded wellness courses and want to upload videos, PDFs, thumbnails, and testimonials.
adminNotes: Asked for storage setup and bulk course import options.

subject: Stripe and Razorpay setup
message: Please share how payment keys and coupons are configured for paid self-learning courses.
adminNotes: Payment-focused lead. Good fit for starter kit.

subject: Certificate template customization
message: Can we use our academy logo and instructor signature on generated certificates?
adminNotes: Interested in branding and certificate workflow.

subject: Admin demo request
message: I want to review the admin dashboard, course builder, coupon manager, and sales overview before buying.

subject: Student mobile experience
message: Most of our learners use mobile. We need course pages and dashboard screens to work nicely on phones.

subject: Demo import after installation
message: Can the installer create an admin account and import demo courses, articles, testimonials, and settings automatically?

subject: Starter LMS for design courses
message: We sell design and communication courses. I need a simple self-learning LMS without enterprise complexity.
adminNotes: Marked as closed demo lead for sales overview variety.
